userMessages.text: fix all findings and then set the story to done

epic 5 is not needed, I don't want a monorepo. I want that the project is defined in "_bmad-custom", which can be easily integrated in any bmad project installing the folder and running the bmad-ui app. The setup should be easy an fast with a command like "npx bmad-method-ui install". So a monorepo is not what we need to to easily do that
include also a new epic to add small ui improvements in the bmad-ui app
there is just one prd in the planning artifacts
I have described that in the correct course skill launched before
/bmad-help review the epics.md, there are changes after the correct course, what I should do now?
mu mal hecho. Solo un link de sessiones que lleve al listado con todas las sessioens
but not the sessions in analytics, a new sessions listing page with just the sessions sorted by start data and a link to go into it
he actualizado el vercel token en el .env, encryptalo e intentalo de nuevo
